parameters.query: SELECT a.id, a.tenant_id, a.phone, a.service, a.date, a.time_start, c.name FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id WHERE DATE(a.date) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND a.reminder_sent = false AND a.status = 'confirmed' LIMIT 100

INSERT INTO conversations (tenant_id, phone, direction, content, source, created_at) VALUES ({{$node['format_reminder'].json.tenant_id}}, '{{$node['format_reminder'].json.phone}}', 'outbound', '{{$node['format_reminder'].json.message}}', 'reminder', NOW())
UPDATE appointments SET reminder_sent = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{$node['format_reminder'].json.apt_id}}
